# GSS_S_CALL_BAD_STRUCTURE

**Global Variable**

Improperly formatted parameter.

## Declaration

```swift
var GSS_S_CALL_BAD_STRUCTURE: UInt { get }
```

## Calling Errors

- **GSS_S_CALL_INACCESSIBLE_READ**: A required input parameter could not be read.
- **GSS_S_CALL_INACCESSIBLE_WRITE**: A required output parameter failed to write.

items.description: A required input parameter could not be read.
items.name: GSS_S_CALL_INACCESSIBLE_READ

items.description: A required output parameter failed to write.
